name: WJX Ultimate Needle Cartridge – 0.25mm 1RL
shortDescription: Premium WJX Ultimate Round Liner needle cartridge with 0.25 mm needle thickness, 1RL configuration. 20 pcs sterile, individually packaged needle cartridges per box. With advanced membrane technology.
description:
The WJX Ultimate Round Liner needle cartridge represents the new generation of premium quality needles. Designed specifically for professional tattoo and permanent makeup artists who seek the most precise line work and hygiene.

The 0.25 mm needle thickness and 1RL configuration is ideal for fine, detailed contours and precise line work. The tightly closed circular needle arrangement ensures accurate and strong results.

The advanced membrane technology reduces needle bounce-back and protects the machine. The transparent, ergonomic cartridge design provides better visibility during work.

1 box = 20 pcs sterile, individually packaged needle cartridges.

faq.question: How does WJX differ from Oceanheart needle cartridges?
faq.answer: WJX Ultimate needle cartridges feature advanced membrane technology that reduces needle bounce-back and protects the machine. Additionally, WJX needles come in 20-piece packaging, which offers better value for larger quantities.

faq.question: Is the needle cartridge sterile, and how many times can it be used?
faq.answer: Yes, every needle cartridge arrives in sterile, individually packaged form. Needle cartridges are single-use – for hygienic reasons, a new cartridge must be used for each treatment. 1 box contains 20 needle cartridges.

faq.question: Which machines is the WJX needle cartridge compatible with?
faq.answer: WJX needle cartridges are compatible with most standard cartridge tattoo machines. They work excellently with MAST (P60, Nano 2, Y22 Pro), Dragonhawk, and other universal cartridge system machines.
